MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Renita Mason.
Attorney Monelle Palencia appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Latista Craig and Ed'Driana Gatlin are present.
Attorney Courtney E. Paison representing the defendants through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of JAN-28-2013 remains on calendar.
